title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (`langchain-ollama`) exposing Ollama models & embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model, packaged as a single Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama (Maven Central: `io.github.amithkoujalgi:ollama4j`).

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem `ollama` providing idiomatic access to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient CLI wrapper (Go) for pulling, listing and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, exposing Ollama models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin that uses local Ollama models for code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image (`ollama/ollama`) and compose examples for CPU & GPU setups.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI (Rust + React) for chatting with Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for installing and running Ollama.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Scripts to convert & quantize Hugging Face models into Ollama-compatible GGUF format.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Community Slack bot (Node.js) that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to Discord servers with thread support.

title: ollama-datasets
summary: Curated collection of evaluation datasets and benchmarks formatted for Ollama.
